The only deal with Iran is - unconditional surrender. Listen to the Mark Levin Show podcast here, for free.

megaphone.link/WWO1093426150

Everyone is talking about the war with Iran—but the real question is what happens after victory. In this clip, I explain why history matters. From the Battle of Yorktown and the French alliance in the American Revolutionary War to the lessons of World War I and World War II, winning a war requires more than military success—it requires a strategy for what comes next. If we ignore that lesson with Iran, the Middle East, and U.S. national security, we risk repeating the mistakes that created chaos

Mr. President:

I am beyond humbled by your words and graciousness in writing such a beautiful note and sharing it on Truth Social.  I am honored that you took the time to write it.  

Your courage, strength, and moral clarity are truly unparalleled.  And your leadership has made our country and the world much safer.  Both you and what you are doing deserve our support.  And I will not be intimidated or bow to threats.  

Through your insight and steady hand, America has been made great again. I

My opening tonight on Life, Liberty & Levin

foxnews.com/video/6390997828…
See you soon, 8 PM eastern on Life, Liberty & Levin on Fox! DVR the show if you can’t watch live.

If you don’t believe the Democrats want us to lose the Iran war and hate us, read this

newsbusters.org/blogs/nb/ste…

President of our country or some other?


OutspokenSamantha (@Outspoken_Sam)

Marjorie Taylor Greene says the reason Tucker Carlson is being attacked right now is because we're terrified of him running for President because ...

... wait for it...

We know he'd win 😂😂😂

What's your reaction??





— https://nitter.net/Outspoken_Sam/status/2033271613735506308#m

NEVER FORGET

The entire cabal of Woke Reich neo-fascist isolationists are smearing our POTUS and our military in the middle of a righteous and noble military campaign.  They are a Fifth Column giving aid and comfort to a horrific, genocidal enemy.  They've always been fake MAGA and have joined the Marxist-Islamist left in their unconscionable efforts and campaign.  In the end, it is us -- we, the people -- who they despise.

The Democrat party is at war with the American people. Listen, for free, to the Mark Levin Show podcast here. 

megaphone.link/WWO1093426150

Absolutely awful. But par for the course.


Joel Mowbray (@joelmowbray)

🚨 EXCLUSIVE — Megyn Kelly refused to label as a "terrorist" Ayman Ghazali, who targeted a Michigan Jewish preschool.

Mohamed Jaloul at Old Dominion in Virgina? "Terrorist."

Ndiaga Diagne in Austin? "Terrorist."

But Ghazali? "Naturalized citizen from Lebanon."

This was no slip of the tongue on her Friday show.
